name: jui-modern
description: Monorepo workspace for modernizing the JUI package family.

scripts.check: biome check package.json biome.json README.md docs
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test:mock-static-site && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json biome.json README.md docs
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json biome.json README.md docs
